title: Medical — Monologue
description: Listen, then prove you were listening

_voiceScript.script:
Lekárka: Dobrý deň. Čo vás trápi?
Amina: Dobrý deň. Bolí ma krk a mám horúčku.
Lekárka: Odkedy máte tieto ťažkosti?
Amina: Od včera večera. Aj hlava ma bolí.
Lekárka: Otvorte ústa, prosím. Povedzite aaah.
Amina: Aaah.
Lekárka: Hrdlo máte červené. Zhlboka dýchajte.
Amina: Je to vážne?
Lekárka: Nie. Máte angínu. Predpíšem vám antibiotiká.
Amina: Ako ich mám užívať?
Lekárka: Trikrát denne, po jedle. A pite veľa vody.
Amina: Smiem ísť do školy? Študujem medicínu.
Lekárka: Nie. Zostante doma tri dni. Odpočívajte.
Amina: Dobre. Kedy mám prísť znova?
Lekárka: O týždeň. Alebo skôr, ak vám bude horšie.
Amina: Ďakujem, pani doktorka. Dovidenia.

exercises.instruction: Tap every word or expression you heard in the conversation.

questions.questionEn: The doctor asks what is wrong. What does Amina say?

answers.textEn: Bolí ma brucho a mám horúčku.
Bolí ma krk a mám horúčku.
Bolí ma hlava a mám nádchu.

questions.answerMeaning: Bolí ma krk a mám horúčku. = My throat hurts and I have a fever. Bolieť = to hurt, krk = throat/neck, horúčka = fever.

reviewPair.slovak: Bolí ma krk a mám horúčku.
reviewPair.english: My throat hurts and I have a fever.

questions.questionEn: The doctor examines Amina's throat. What does she say about it?
questions.answerMeaning: Hrdlo máte červené. = Your throat is red. Hrdlo = throat, červený = red.

questions.questionEn: What does the doctor diagnose Amina with?
questions.answerMeaning: Máte angínu. = You have tonsillitis. Angína in Slovak means tonsillitis or strep throat — not cardiac angina.

questions.questionEn: How and when must Amina take the antibiotics?

answers.textEn: Three times a day, after meals
Once a day, in the morning

questions.answerMeaning: Trikrát denne, po jedle. = Three times a day, after meals. Trikrát = three times, denne = daily, po jedle = after meals.

reviewPair.english: Three times a day, after meals.

questions.questionEn: Amina asks if she can go to school. What does she reveal about herself?

answers.textEn: She teaches Slovak at the school
She has an important exam that day

questions.answerMeaning: Amina says Študujem medicínu. = I am studying medicine. Študovať = to study, medicína = medicine.

questions.questionEn: When does the doctor tell Amina to come back?
questions.answerMeaning: O týždeň. = In a week. Týždeň = week. She can also come sooner — Alebo skôr, ak vám bude horšie = or sooner if you get worse.

sentences.promptEn: My throat hurts and I have a fever.
You have tonsillitis. I will prescribe you antibiotics.
Three times a day, after meals.
Stay home for three days. Rest.
In a week. Or sooner if you get worse.
